name: What evidence do I need to prove Perplexity scraped my site without permission?
description: Screenshots, bot logs, query matches—block crawlers now.[1]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to prove Perplexity scraped my site without permission?

acceptedAnswer.text: Screenshots, bot logs, query matches—block crawlers now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Screenshots of AI outputs reproducing your content, server logs showing PerplexityBot crawlers, and query recreations form core evidence.[1] NYT detailed two-stage scraping and output generation.[1] Key factors: crawler user-agent logs, verbatim matches, volume of copies.[1] Use tools like Cloudflare to block bots; subpoena Perplexity's training data if litigating. Solid evidence drives settlements.
